KnowMoreAboutUs

Infollion aggregates subject matter experts, independent consultants and freelancers to facilitate their access for short-term expertise to companies, consulting firms and investment funds. Infollion offers flexible modes of engagement to reach out to experts on its panel.

It ranges from a very short phone call to a few months long project based on pre-determined statement of work. The Panel can be accessed in 3 easy steps.

Expert Network

10,000+ verified experts across 150+ industries globally.

AI Matching

Our algorithms match your brief to the right expert in under 48 hours.

Compliant

GDPR-compliant processes, NDAs, and secure communications.

DEFINE

Looking for deep subject matter expertise? Let us know the knowledge gap you face.

REQUEST

Send a request and we'll share the most relevant expert profiles with pricing & past performance.

CHOOSE

Choose the duration and mode of engagement from our flexible & customizable models.

Modes of Engagement

Calls

Rapid telephonic consultations.

Sit-Ins

Interactive deep-dive workshops.

Tours

Field research and site visits.

PexPanel

Long-term professional engagement.

SampleUse-Cases

Investment Funds

Exploratory research, Deal flow, due-diligence, portfolio resources group.

Research & Consulting

Project proposals, Kick-off hypothesis, Benchmarking, KOL surveys, Analysis validation.

Companies

Kick-starter teams, Private long-term advisors, One-time events, Board members.
